_comment: Per-stage OpenAI model selection. Stage env vars (OPENAI_MODEL_FOCUS_POINTS, OPENAI_MODEL_PREPARATION, OPENAI_MODEL_BANK, OPENAI_MODEL_PLANNER, OPENAI_MODEL_EVALUATION) override these at runtime for ad-hoc testing. The fallback order is: stage env → this config → OPENAI_MODEL env → hard-coded default.
